_comment: Expected output from cpu_contention experiment. II > 0 means latency degraded under CPU stress. With namespace isolation, II should be low (< 0.25). Without isolation, II can exceed 1.0.

workload.target: api-service /health (with cpu-aggressor running in same namespace)

_ii_interpretation: II=0.20 — P95 latency increased 20% under CPU aggressor. Namespace ResourceQuota limits interference but does not eliminate it on a single node.
